label: Transparent Basalt motif
prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: transparent PNG motif source for Morphous catalog theme bundle
Primary request: an isolated basalt column motif for a mineral design system named Basalt
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal; no shadows, no gradients, no floor plane, no texture, no reflections
Subject: a compact cluster of hexagonal black basalt columns, vertical volcanic stone prisms with fractured tops, subtle grey facets, tiny muted lichen green patches in cracks, strong architectural silhouette
Style: high-detail polished bitmap cutout, realistic mineral texture with crisp readable edges, centered composition with generous padding, no text, no watermark
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject; keep the subject fully separated from the background; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no border

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution full design-system board for Morphous catalog, light mode
Primary request: Create a comprehensive design-system board for "Basalt", a mineral theme inspired by basalt columns in a lava field, with a strong data system feel.
Visual identity: black basalt, charcoal facets, cool ash greys, pale volcanic highlights, muted lichen green accents, lava-field mineral texture, hexagonal column geometry, strong grid, dense analytical dashboards.
Canvas: 16:9 landscape design board, clean editorial UI specification sheet, bright light mode, crisp large readable labels, no tiny illegible text, no watermark.
Required content areas: palette swatches with names, typography guidance for English and Japanese, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, navigation/sidebar, dashboard KPI cards, line/bar charts, empty/error/loading states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture sample, icon style, example data product screen.
Style details: precise modular grid, basalt-column dividers, angular but usable components, square-to-8px radii, quiet professional enterprise interface, high contrast but not harsh, consistent tokens.
Palette values to visibly guide the board: Basalt Black #171717, Column Grey #3f4442, Ash Surface #f4f2ed, Lichen Green #7f9164, Mineral Line #c4c7bd, Ember Error #b4533c.
Avoid: generic purple/blue gradients, one-note monochrome palette, stock landing page composition, decorative blob backgrounds, unreadable microtext.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution full design-system board for Morphous catalog, dark mode
Primary request: Create the dark-mode companion design-system board for "Basalt", a mineral theme inspired by basalt columns in a lava field, with a strong data system feel. It must feel like the same system as the light board, translated to dark mode.
Visual identity: black basalt columns, deep charcoal slabs, cool graphite panels, ash grey text, muted lichen green accents, volcanic mineral texture, hexagonal column geometry, strong grid, dense analytical dashboards.
Canvas: 16:9 landscape design board, dark mode UI specification sheet, crisp large readable labels, no tiny illegible text, no watermark.
Required content areas: palette swatches with names, typography guidance for English and Japanese, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, navigation/sidebar, dashboard KPI cards, line/bar charts, empty/error/loading states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture sample, icon style, example data product screen.
Style details: precise modular grid, basalt-column dividers, angular but usable components, square-to-8px radii, enterprise analytics interface, high-contrast data surfaces, consistent semantic tokens.
Palette values to visibly guide the board: Void Basalt #101211, Panel Stone #1d201e, Column Grey #3f4442, Ash Text #e7e5dc, Lichen Green #91a36d, Mineral Line #5d665d, Ember Error #d06b50.
Avoid: generic purple/blue gradients, one-note monochrome palette, stock landing page composition, decorative blob backgrounds, unreadable microtext.
